subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth, become thou a finder, that thou mayest attain unto everlasting life. Beware, test not through trials, for the measure of endurance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوینده حق یابنده شو تا پاینده گردی زنهار امتحان منما زیرا کفه میزان تحمل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
